title: Deep Dark Expanded
description: This mod aims to improve Ancient Cities and the Deep Dark as a whole.
body:
Adds multiple new items to the deep dark as well as improving the loot tables for the ancient cities. Includes a new dimension which can be accessed by lighting the portal in the Ancient City with a Warden Heart.


<details>
<summary>Full List of Features</summary>
-A new Dimension: The Deep Dark Dimension, which is full of sculk and ancient cities ripe for looting.

-A Sculk Sword, which you can right click to summon a warden blast to damage your enemies.

-An Ancient Handle, which can be used to craft the Sculk Sword with two Echo Shards.

-A Warden Heart, which can be used to light the portal in the middle of the Ancient City to access the Deep Dark Dimension.

-An Echo Stone, which you can consume to gain regeneration, speed, and absorption for a small amount of time.

Various balances to ancient cities.
</details>

Remember to clear any sculk off of the portal or it will not light.

This mod uses the [Custom Portal API.](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi)
